steps.name: Given I visit the login page
Click the login button on the home page to open the login form
Click the login button
Wait for element ('xpath', "//button[contains(@class, 'NavButton')]")
When I enter next valid credentials user1 amd pass1
Fill in credentials for user ''user1'' and submit the form
Enter username ''user1''
Wait for element ('xpath', "id('login')//input[contains(@type, 'text')]")
Enter password
Wait for element ('xpath', "id('login')//input[contains(@type, 'password')]")
Click the submit button on the login form
Wait for element ('xpath', "//button[contains(@form, 'login')]")
Then I should see the dashboard
Verify the login button is no longer visible (user is logged in)
Check if the login button is displayed
Wait for element ('xpath', "//button[contains(@class, 'NavButton')]")
Given I visit the login page
